name: Get-PSDrive

options.name: -LiteralName
options.description: Specifies the name of the drive.

options.name: -Name
options.description: Specifies, as a string array, the name or name of drives that this cmdlet gets in the operation. Type the drive name or letter without a colon (`:`).

options.name: -PSProvider
options.description: Specifies, as a string array, the Windows PowerShell provider. This cmdlet gets only the drives supported by this provider. Type the name of a provider, such as FileSystem, Registry, or Certificate.

options.name: -Scope
options.description: Specifies the scope in which this cmdlet gets the drives.

description: Gets drives in the current session.
